label: Basis of Record
description: The specific nature of the data record

label: Dataset ID
description: An identifier for the dataset

label: Dataset Name
description: The name identifying the dataset

label: Occurrence ID
description: Identifier for the occurrence record

label: Individual Count
description: The number of individuals present

label: Sex
description: The sex of the biological individual(s)

label: Life Stage
description: The age class or life stage of the individual(s)

label: Reproductive Condition
description: The reproductive condition of the individual(s)

label: Behavior
description: A description of the behavior shown by the subject

label: Occurrence Status
description: A statement about the presence or absence of a taxon

label: Occurrence Remarks
description: Comments about the occurrence

label: Organism
description: A particular organism or defined group of organisms

label: Organism ID
description: Identifier for the organism instance

label: Organism Name
description: A textual name or label for the organism

label: Event ID
description: Identifier for the sampling event

label: Event Date
description: The date or date-interval of the event

label: Year
description: The four-digit year of the event

label: Month
description: The integer month of the event

label: Day
description: The integer day of the month of the event

label: Sampling Protocol
description: The method or protocol used for sampling

label: Sampling Effort
description: The amount of effort expended during sampling

label: Sample Size Value
description: A numeric value for a measurement of the sample size

label: Sample Size Unit
description: The unit of measurement for the sample size

label: Event Remarks
description: Comments about the event

label: Location ID
description: Identifier for the location

label: Locality
description: The specific description of the place

label: Water Body
description: The name of the water body

label: Decimal Latitude
description: The geographic latitude in decimal degrees

label: Decimal Longitude
description: The geographic longitude in decimal degrees

label: Coordinate Uncertainty
description: The horizontal distance from the coordinates describing the smallest circle containing the whole of the Location

label: Geodetic Datum
description: The ellipsoid, geodetic datum, or spatial reference system (SRS)

label: Taxon ID
description: Identifier for the taxon

label: Scientific Name
description: The full scientific name

label: Vernacular Name
description: A common or vernacular name

label: Kingdom
description: The full scientific name of the kingdom

label: Phylum
description: The full scientific name of the phylum

label: Class
description: The full scientific name of the class

label: Order
description: The full scientific name of the order

label: Family
description: The full scientific name of the family

label: Genus
description: The full scientific name of the genus

label: Specific Epithet
description: The name of the species epithet

label: Measurement ID
description: Identifier for the measurement

label: Measurement Type
description: The nature of the measurement

label: Measurement Value
description: The value of the measurement

label: Measurement Unit
description: The units for the measurement value

label: Measurement Method
description: The method used to make the measurement

label: Measurement Remarks
description: Comments about the measurement
